title: "merge()"
description: "merge: interleave several sources — emit each DATA from whichever dep fired. `partial:true` (combine-family): fires on any single dep, not gated on all deps settling."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

merge: interleave several sources — emit each DATA from whichever dep fired. `partial:true`
(combine-family): fires on any single dep, not gated on all deps settling.

## Import

```ts
import { merge } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";
```

## Signature

```ts
function merge(): Operator<T, T>
```

## Returns

An operator that forwards DATA from any dependency.

## Example

```ts
import { graph } from "@graphrefly/ts/graph";
import { merge } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";

const merged = graph().initNode(merge<number>(), [left, right]);
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/operators.ts`
